title: Deluxe 9 Piece Wood Burning Pen Tool Hobby & Craft Kit
description:
Add some flare to any wood working project with the 9pc Universal Tool Wood Burning Pen & Soldering Tips Set! The 9pc Wood Burning Pen & Soldering Tips Set is a great addition to your wood working or soldering tool collection. This set comes with everything you'll need for your wood working projects: a wood burning pen, 6 assorted soldering tips, hot knife chuck for hot blade and a safety stand. It has 25 watt power, 110-120V 60Hz and is UL Approved EZ14195. This set is great for wood working, hobbies, crafting, home improvement and more! Make sure to grab one before your next project.

Deluxe 9 Piece Wood Burning Pen Tool Hobby & Craft Kit

Add some flare to any wood working project with the 9pc Universal Tool Wood Burning Pen & Soldering Tips Set!

Key Features

  • Universal Tool Wood Burning Pen & Assorted Tips Set, 9 Total Pieces - Ideal for beginner craft hobbyist. Ideal arts and craft hobby Christmas gift.
  • COMPONENTS INCLUDED: Safety Stand, Hot Chuck, Wood Pen, (6) Interchangeable Tips: (2) Brass wood burning tips, (2) Steel soldering tips, (1) Steel chiseled tip, (1) Hot razor blade
  • PERFORMS MULTIPLE FUNCTIONS: Leather Burning, Wood burning, Soldering, Chiseling, Melting, Cutting
  • SPECIFICATIONS: Watts: 25w | Voltage: 110V-120V | Frequency: 60Hz | UL listed | Length: 7-3/4″ | Long electrical cord attached for a wide range of movement
  • Great for Wood Working, Soldering, Metal Working, Hobby, Craft, Home Improvement & More!

Product Specifications

  • MPN: 9PCWBTS-51
  • UPC: 778454515332
  • Color: Red
  • Size: 9pc
